pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly specify Latitude 69.6492 N.
Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly specify Longitude 18.9553 E.
Calculated 69.6492 * pi / 180, rounding to 5 decimal places; matching verifier.py TROMSO_LAT_RAD=1.21561.
Calculated 18.9553 * pi / 180, rounding to 5 decimal places; matching verifier.py TROMSO_LON_RAD=0.33083.
Task description explicitly specifies Altitude 10 meters.
Task description and verifier.py scoring logic explicitly check these exact flag boolean states.
Task description explicitly specifies this output notes path, and export_result.sh collects it from here.
Task description explicitly states screenshots are saved here, which is verified by export_result.sh setup.
Task description explicitly requires 3 screenshots, and verifier.py expects new_ss >= 3.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that this synthetic task explicitly defines all location and configuration values directly in its description and verifier. The expected latitude is 69.6492 (1.21561 rad) and longitude is 18.9553 (0.33083 rad) with altitude 10m. The required date and time are 2023-12-21 at 11:00:00 UTC. The required display flags correctly align with the prompt (atmosphere ON, landscape OFF, constellation drawing/names ON, azimuthal grid/cardinal points ON). It expects at least 3 screenshots saved to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium, and a notes text file at /home/ga/Desktop/polar_night_lighting_notes.txt.
